meta.description: Nachmund Gauntlet Crusade — Tactical Reserves, Surgical Deep Strike, campaign, Battle Traits, Relics

tacticalReserves.description: Crusade armies split into Primary wave and Reinforcement waves. Only 2 of 3 Reinforcement waves participate per battle

waveArrival.primaryWave: Set up normally during Deploy Armies step
waveArrival.wave2: At start of Reinforcements step of round 2 Movement phase — select one Reinforcement wave, all units arrive as Strategic Reserves
waveArrival.wave3: At start of Reinforcements step of round 3 — select one remaining Reinforcement wave, arrive as Strategic Reserves
waveArrival.unusedWave: Takes no part in battle. Not part of Crusade army for that battle. Does not gain XP. If WARLORD in unused wave — counts as destroyed for mission purposes (no Out of Action test)

rulesAdaptations.battlefieldEdgeSetUp: When setting up from Reserves (not Surgical Deep Strike) — can set up within 1" of own battlefield edge even if enemy within 9" (not within Engagement Range). Unit automatically Battle-shocked if set up this way
rulesAdaptations.leaderAttachment: Leaders can only attach to units in their own wave
rulesAdaptations.transportEmbarking: Units can only start embarked in TRANSPORTs in their own wave

surgicalDeepStrike.description: Once per turn — when unit with Deep Strike arrives from Reserves, can perform Surgical Deep Strike instead of normal Deep Strike
surgicalDeepStrike.cannotDoBoth: If unit has rule allowing set up closer than 9" — must choose either that rule OR Surgical Deep Strike, not both
surgicalDeepStrike.setup: Set up anywhere more than 3" horizontally from all enemy models

deepStrikeTest.roll: 2D6 — subtract 1 for each enemy model within 9" of your unit (excluding Battle-shocked and OC 0 models)

results.4+: PRECISION STRIKE — unit can act normally this turn
results.3: HURLED INTO BATTLE — unit must take Battle-shock test
results.1orLess: DEEP STRIKE MISHAP — roll D6 on Mishap table

mishapTable.1: DANGEROUS INGRESS — D3 mortal wounds + Battle-shocked
mishapTable.2: RECALLED UNDER FIRE — D3 mortal wounds + placed into Strategic Reserves (cannot set up this turn)
mishapTable.3: OFF TARGET — D3 mortal wounds + Battle-shocked + must perform another Surgical Deep Strike, no models within 12" of previous position
mishapTable.4: ANTICIPATED — D3 mortal wounds + Battle-shocked + one enemy within 9" can make Normal move up to D6"
mishapTable.5: MIS_DROP — D6 mortal wounds + Battle-shocked + not eligible to declare charge until end of turn
mishapTable.6: DISASTER — D6 mortal wounds + Battle-shocked + not eligible to shoot or declare charge until end of turn

surgicalDeepStrike.preventionNote: Rules preventing units from setting up within 12" of a unit apply even during Surgical Deep Strike

strategicAdvantage.definition: First player whose progressive objective VP total reaches 10 or more gains strategic advantage
strategicAdvantage.battleEnd: Battle ends at end of any round where a player has strategic advantage (otherwise after 5 rounds)
strategicAdvantage.victor: Player with most VP wins. If tied — player with strategic advantage wins. Otherwise draw

mightyChampioms.description: EPIC HERO units assigned Crusade Ability by Campaign Master — increases Crusade points by 1 per EPIC HERO unit

abilities.FRONT_LINE_CHAMPION: Select one Battle Trait at Declare Battle Formations — EPIC HERO and any unit they join have it
abilities.STRATEGIC_CHAMPION: At Select Crusade Blessings — roll D6: on 4+, Underdog gets +1 Blessing; if not Underdog, get 1 Blessing
abilities.NEMESIS_CHAMPION: If CHARACTER destroyed by EPIC HERO's attacks — all army units gain +1XP at end of battle. +1 SAP if WARLORD destroyed
abilities.INSPIRATIONAL_CHAMPION: While leading unit — ignore any/all Battle Scars of Bodyguard. +1 unit can be Marked for Greatness
abilities.RESTORATIVE_CHAMPION: Can re-roll failed Out of Action tests for Crusade army
abilities.SUBTLE_CHAMPION: Can re-roll dice when determining Attacker/Defender
abilities.LOGISTICAL_CHAMPION: If victor and EPIC HERO on battlefield — gain Victor bonus a second time

monsterAndVehicle.REINFORCED_ARMOUR: AP of attacks with Damage 1 worsened by 1
monsterAndVehicle.UNRELENTING: Ignore Move modifiers. Can move through terrain but roll D6 after — on 1-3, Battle-shocked
monsterAndVehicle.TITAN_SLAYER: Re-roll Hit rolls of 1 against MONSTER/VEHICLE. Re-roll Hit roll against TITANIC

infantry.GRIM_SURVIVORS: Once per battle at start of any phase — Feel No Pain 5+ (or 4+ if Below Half-strength) until end of phase
infantry.DROP_ZONE_DEFENDERS: While wholly in own deployment zone — +1 Leadership and OC. Enemy Surgical Deep Strike within 9" — subtract 1 from Deep Strike test
infantry.STRIKEMASTERS: Spend 1RP at Declare Battle Formations — unit has Deep Strike and +1 to Surgical Deep Strike tests
infantry.TEMPERED_IN_BATTLE: Once per battle in Command phase — eligible to shoot, charge, and perform Actions in turn it Fell Back. Also eligible for Actions while Battle-shocked
infantry.FLEET_OF_FOOT: Re-roll Advance rolls. Eligible for Actions when Advancing. When Advancing, enemy cannot use Fire Overwatch against unit
infantry.TERRITORIAL: Re-roll Wound rolls of 1 when attacking unit within range of objective

mounted.EVASIVE: If unit did not Remain Stationary previous turn — worsen AP of ranged attacks by 1
mounted.SHOCK_CAVALRY: +1 to Hit if target Below Starting Strength. +1 to Wound if target Below Half-strength

jumpPack.SLEEK_INTERCEPTORS: When Advancing — do not make Advance roll, instead +6" to Move
jumpPack.FIERY_DESCENT: Once per battle — use Rapid Ingress for 0CP. If Surgical Deep Strike — roll D6 per enemy within 6": on 4+, 1 mortal wound
jumpPack.TAKE_TO_THE_SKIES: Once per battle at end of opponent's Fight phase — remove unit from battlefield, place in Strategic Reserves

beast.POUNCING_PREDATORS: Target with Heroic Intervention for 0CP — until end of turn, unit has Fights First

anyUnit.DROP_ZONE_VETERANS: When set up via Deep Strike — re-roll Hit and Wound rolls of 1 until end of turn. Can re-roll Surgical Deep Strike test
anyUnit.STEALTHY_ARRIVAL: When set up via Deep Strike — has Stealth and enemy cannot Fire Overwatch until start of next turn
anyUnit.PRECISION_INSERTION: Once per battle when set up via Deep Strike — can set up more than 6" from enemy (cannot charge that turn). +2 to Surgical Deep Strike test

alliances.Guardians: Protect Sangua Terra — best for Imperium
alliances.Despoilers: Conquer Sangua Terra — best for Chaos

strategicSites.Praefectus_Bastion: Controlling alliance can muster up to 4 Reinforcement waves
strategicSites.Emperors_Voice_Grand_Battery: When enemy arrives from Strategic Reserves, roll D6: on 5+, D3 mortal wounds
strategicSites.Tower_of_Murmuration: Alliance can select one additional Strategic Goal per phase
strategicSites.Accrandor_Spaceport: Up to two Surgical Deep Strikes per turn. Once per turn can re-roll Deep Strike test

artificer.STRATEGIC_LAURELS: At start of first Command phase if on battlefield — gain 1CP. At end of battle if on battlefield — gain 1 SAP
artificer.CONVERSION_FIELD: 5+ invulnerable save against ranged attacks. On unmodified saving throw of 6 — attacking unit suffers 1 mortal wound
artificer.GENE_TOXIN_AUTOFONT: Select melee weapon. After bearer fights — select enemy unit hit: until battle end, roll D6 at start of each Command phase: 1 = poison wears off, 2-3 = 1 mortal wound, 4+ = D3 mortal wounds

antiquity.HAMMER_OF_THE_HEAVENS: Once per battle in Command phase — place marker. At start of next Command phase: roll 6D6 for each unit within 6" (+2 per unit within 3"): each 4+ = 1 mortal wound
antiquity.MAELSTROM_CLARION: Enemy units arriving from Reserves cannot set up within 12" of bearer
antiquity.DISPLACER_FIELD: Once per battle at end of opponent's Shooting phase (if not in Engagement Range and was targeted) — remove unit from battlefield into Strategic Reserves. When next set up, models have Deep Strike until end of phase
antiquity.SIGIL_OF_PSYCHIC_AMPLIFICATION: PSYKER only. +6" range to Psychic ranged weapons. +6" range to Psychic abilities. Psychic Aura abilities +3" range

legendary.GLOAMING_MANTLE: Bearer has Lone Operative and Stealth. While leading unit — unit has Stealth and can only be targeted by ranged attacks if attacker within 18"
legendary.LYRETH_MIRROR: At end of opponent's Movement phase — select enemy set up within 12" this phase: your unit can shoot (only targeting that unit if eligible) or declare charge (no Charge bonus)
legendary.FATE_FORGED_WEAPON: Select melee weapon — re-roll Wound rolls. Once per battle at start of Fight phase — until end of turn, weapon has DEVASTATING WOUNDS and +battle round number to Strength and Attacks
